name: The Hapless Deserter

sheet.name: The Hapless Deserter
sheet.background_story:
Since fleeing his charge during a bygone war, he has traversed the Forsaken Lands seeking penance for his cowardice. 

His path since has been one forked between the unpredictable swings of well meaning charity and muted sensibility - he has found the nox to offer suitable respite from the spectre of guilt. 

At the eve of the Blood Moon harvest, he trails a company of Leornings and Pilgrims to the Cairn in a lucid stupor.

description:
Since fleeing his charge during a bygone war, he has traversed the Forsaken Lands seeking penance for his cowardice. 

His path since has been one forked between the unpredictable swings of well meaning charity and muted sensibility - he has found the nox to offer suitable respite from the spectre of guilt. 

At the eve of the Blood Moon harvest, he trails a company of Leornings and Pilgrims to the Cairn in a lucid stupor.
